# Amit Plastic — Furniture Exclusive Showroom
> Sitamarhi's largest wholesale furniture distributor and retail showroom, trusted since 2002.

## About

Amit Plastic is a 20+ year old family-run furniture business in Sitamarhi, Bihar, India, founded by Vijay ji (fondly known as Lalan ji). In the 1990s, Vijay ji started "Amit Engineering" — a workshop crafting almirahs, shutters, iron grills, and gates. In 2002, he opened Amit Plastic in Janki Palace Market, Sitamarhi as a separate venture focused on furniture retail and wholesale distribution. In October 2019, the Exclusive Showroom opened at its current Thana Road location.

The business serves two key customer segments:
- **Wholesale**: Supplies furniture stock to shops and retailers across Sitamarhi district and nearby regions
- **Retail**: Walk-in showroom open for individual customers and families

## Contact & Location

- **Phone**: +91 9835242431, +91 7654957236, +91 9471805297
- **WhatsApp**: +91 9835242431
- **Email**: amitplasticstm@gmail.com
- **Address**: Near Mata Vaishno Mandir, Thana Road, Sitamarhi — 843302, Bihar, India
- **Google Maps**: https://maps.app.goo.gl/xo1miWgQQ8HWe3oT6
- **Coordinates**: 26.5918° N, 85.4893° E
- **Hours**: Open daily 10:30 AM – 8:30 PM (including Sundays)

## Authorized Brands

- **Supreme Furniture** — India's #1 plastic furniture brand (chairs, tables, stools, outdoor, storage)
- **Linc Furniture** — Premium plastic furniture and steel almirahs
- **Milton** — Thermowares: insulated bottles, lunch boxes, water jugs, casseroles
- **Sapana** — Carpets, door mats, floor mats, rugs
- **Spacewood** — Modern modular furniture (wardrobes, beds, study tables, TV units)
- **SPL** — Quality plastic products (chairs, tables, storage, household items)
- **Uniko** — Stylish plastic furniture (chairs, tables, stools, outdoor)
- **Sleepwell** — India's leading mattress brand (mattresses, pillows, cushions)
- **CMP** — Quality household products (storage, containers, kitchen items)

## Product Categories

### Plastic Furniture
Chairs, dining sets, center tables, stools, beds, kids furniture — Supreme, Linc & Uniko brands

### Home Furniture
Steel almirahs, TV units, beds, wardrobes, dressing tables, mattresses

### Thermowares
Insulated lunch boxes, bottles, water jugs, casseroles — Milton brand

### Household Essentials
Buckets, dustbins, patlas, planters, tubs, chatai mats, door mats

### Carpets & Mats
Sapana carpets, door mats, floor mats, rugs

## Business Details

- **Founded**: 2002 (Amit Plastic); precursor Amit Engineering started in the 1990s
- **Exclusive Showroom**: Opened October 8, 2019 at Thana Road, Sitamarhi
- **Owner/Founder**: Vijay ji (Lalan ji)
- **Type**: Wholesale distributor + retail showroom
- **Rating**: 4.6★ on Google (27 reviews), 4.6★ on JustDial (32 reviews)
- **Customers**: 10,000+ families served
- **Coverage**: Sitamarhi district and surrounding Bihar regions
- **Payment**: Cash, UPI, Bank Transfer

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Does Amit Plastic offer wholesale rates?**
Yes. Amit Plastic is Sitamarhi's primary wholesale furniture distributor. Shop owners and dealers can contact via WhatsApp (+91 9835242431) for bulk pricing.

**Q: Which brands does Amit Plastic stock?**
Supreme Furniture, Linc Furniture, Milton Thermowares, Sapana Carpets, Spacewood, SPL, Uniko, Sleepwell, and CMP — all authorized dealerships.

**Q: Where is Amit Plastic located?**
Near Mata Vaishno Mandir, Thana Road, Sitamarhi, Bihar — 843302. The Exclusive Showroom opened at this location in October 2019.

**Q: What are the opening hours?**
Open every day from 10:30 AM to 8:30 PM, including Sundays.

**Q: Can I visit the showroom?**
Yes, the retail showroom is open for walk-in customers. Call +91 9835242431 or WhatsApp for any queries.

**Q: Does Amit Plastic deliver?**
Contact the store on WhatsApp (+91 9835242431) for delivery and bulk order logistics.

**Q: How can I contact Amit Plastic?**
Call: +91 9835242431, +91 7654957236, or +91 9471805297. Email: amitplasticstm@gmail.com. WhatsApp: +91 9835242431.

**Q: What payment methods are accepted?**
Cash, UPI, and Bank Transfer.
